basic_details.job_title: JK Bank Auditor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit
basic_details.short_information: Jammu & Kashmir Bank (JK Bank) Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website of JK Bank. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JK Bank Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Registered Chartered / Cost Accountant firm having at least one FCA qualified Auditor
qualification.details: Registered Chartered / Cost Accountant firm having at least one FCA qualified Auditor.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the JK Bank Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of JK Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download JK Bank Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit Job 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JK Bank Concurrent Audit recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the JK Bank Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit recruitment is 26-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of Auditor in the JK Bank Chartered / Cost Accountant Firms for Concurrent Audit recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q4. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required to apply?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is to be a Registered Chartered / Cost Accountant firm having at least one FCA qualified Auditor.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JK Bank Concurrent Audit recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Online Application, Document Verification, and Empanelment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Jammu & Kashmir Bank?
faq.answer: The official website of Jammu & Kashmir Bank is https://www.jkb.bank.in/.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online only through the official JK Bank website.
